svg.title: Paper Tag Taxonomy v0.1 — Signal Finder + CodeTape commons field sheet
svg.desc: Twelve paper tag symbols with their meanings: Water Needed, Medical Need, Checked OK, Do Not Enter, Safe Route, Shelter, Food, Power Needed, Animal or Pet Present, Elder or Disabled Person Present, Children Present, Message Left Here. Each tag shows a simple geometric symbol readable by eye, with the label below. Designed for field printing, library wall, CERT binder, and mutual-aid packets. Eye-readable first. Machine-readable second. Human dignity always.
svg.text: Signal Finder + CodeTape · commons field sheet · print · copy · share freely
Eye-readable first. Machine-readable second. Human dignity always.
Each tag: large symbol · bold label · blank back for writing · hole for hanging or pinning

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How would a community use the Water Needed tag?')
sendPrompt('How would a community use the Medical Need tag?')

sendPrompt('How would a community use the Animal or Pet Present tag?')
sendPrompt('How would a community use the Elder or Disabled Person Present tag?')
sendPrompt('How would a community use the Children Present tag?')
sendPrompt('How would a community use the Message Left Here tag?')

svg.text: · Print on card stock · laminate if possible · punch a hole at top · hang with string, tape, or pin
· Write date, time, and your initials on the back — always. A tag without a date is unverifiable.
· Number + address on back: e.g. "04 – 142 Elm St – checked 14:30 Jun 3 – J.R."
· If writing conditions: smoke, wet, gloves — use a marker, not a pen. Mark X through a tag to cancel it.
· A steward (zone ③) collects tags and holds the local record. Tags belong to the community.
Back of each tag (fill in by hand)
Address or location description · Date and time · Your initials · Notes or number count
If cancelled: draw a large X across the front and write the cancellation time on the back.
This taxonomy is a seed — not a standard. Adapt symbols for your community, language, and conditions.
Add tags. Change shapes. Translate labels. Share what you change.
Signal Finder + CodeTape · Paper Tag Taxonomy v0.1 · commons seed · no rights reserved
Read → critique → adapt → test one tiny piece → share what you learn
